offer: For law firms processing 5–15 legal documents/month, inefficient document conversion causes submission delays. We provide a streamlined conversion service instead of manual conversion of documents by staff.
problem: Inefficient document conversion processes lead to submission delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on document workflows
DM outreach to law firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for legal tech tools
try_it: Let users try basic format selection and status tracking for conversions on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the conversion process
Offer onboarding for first 10 early-access users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Store common document formats as templates
Set default reminders for document status
Allow CSV import for existing documents
